summary: NLYT Proof System and Provider Mode Changes - All features verified. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: Wizard video provider selection working correctly with 'Coller un lien de visio' as first option, Zoom has no 'Recommandé' badge. AppointmentDetail shows NLYT Proof Sessions section with session table and copy link buttons. CheckinPage loads correctly with participant info and check-in button.

backend: Zoom does not have universal=true flag
Proof info endpoint returns 200 with valid token
Proof info rejects invalid token with 404
Checkin creates session and returns session_id
Checkout computes score and returns proof_level
Sessions endpoint returns list of sessions
Validate accepts valid status (present, partial, absent)
frontend: Wizard: External link option 'Coller un lien de visio' is present and first
Wizard: Zoom option is present without 'Recommandé' badge
Wizard: Zoom is disabled when not connected
Wizard: Teams option is present with 'Connecté' status
Wizard: Meet option is present with 'via Google Calendar' status
AppointmentDetail: NLYT Proof Sessions section is present
AppointmentDetail: Shows 'Liens de check-in NLYT' with copy link button
AppointmentDetail: Session table shows PARTICIPANT, CHECK-IN, DURÉE, HEARTBEATS, SCORE, NIVEAU, STATUT, ACTIONS
AppointmentDetail: Sessions display with scores and validation actions
CheckinPage: Loads correctly with 'Preuve de présence' title
CheckinPage: Shows participant name and email
CheckinPage: Shows appointment title and datetime
CheckinPage: Shows 'Je rejoins la réunion' check-in button

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing Link2 import in AppointmentWizard.js (line 10) - was causing runtime error
video_evidence_routes.py lines 277-312: provider-status endpoint correctly returns mode='user' for all providers (Zoom, Teams, Meet)
meeting_provider_service.py: Zoom create_meeting correctly sets creation_mode='user' in metadata
proof_routes.py: All endpoints working correctly - info, checkin, heartbeat, checkout, sessions, validate
AppointmentWizard.js: External link option correctly positioned as first option with 'Simple' badge
AppointmentDetail.js: NLYT Proof Sessions section correctly displays sessions with validation actions
CheckinPage.js: Correctly loads participant info and provides check-in functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: NLYT Proof System fully tested. All providers (Zoom, Teams, Meet) now return mode='user' instead of 'central'. Wizard shows 'Coller un lien de visio' as first option. AppointmentDetail shows NLYT Proof Sessions section with session table. CheckinPage works correctly. Fixed missing Link2 import in AppointmentWizard.js. Test appointment 35df4fb0-91ac-4d6a-a56b-cfd6e06b4111 has 3 proof sessions for testing.

bug_fixed.issue: Link2 is not defined - ReferenceError in AppointmentWizard.js
bug_fixed.root_cause: Link2 icon from lucide-react was used on line 571 but not imported
bug_fixed.fix: Added Link2 to the import statement on line 10
